dialogueChunks.plotStep: The regional council reviewed our evidence and ruled in our favor. {quest_focus} has been reinstated with new terms and honest leadership. {target_npc} received a formal apology. The raids have slowed now that patrols are running again. {location} is breathing easier for the first time in months.
dialogueChunks.outro: You carried truth through a dangerous road and it arrived intact. {quest_stakes} no longer. Take this: our way of saying the oath we make to you is one we'll keep.

playerResponses.text: An oath kept is worth more than gold. Take care of each other.
Make sure the new commander knows people are watching.
Good. Now hold them to it.

dialogueChunks.intro: It's over, {player_name}. The council heard everything.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The evidence was undeniable. {target_npc} tried to deny it, then went quiet. The council dissolved the partnership in my favor. They left {location} that night without a word. I won't pretend it feels good. {quest_focus} was something we built together, and now I'm running it alone. But at least things are honest again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this drink and this reward: you helped me save a business and what's left of my dignity.

playerResponses.text: Honest ale in an honest tavern. That's a foundation worth building on.
You lost a partner but kept your integrity. I'd say you came out ahead.

dialogueChunks.intro: The guild master resigned this morning, {player_name}. Walked out before the council could vote on removal.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The copied covenant matched the original terms exactly. There was no denying the breach. The local merchants are reorganizing under new leadership: {target_npc} among them. Fair prices are being restored, and the enforcers scattered. Five years of corruption, undone by {quest_focus} and the courage to use it.
dialogueChunks.outro: You walked through danger to retrieve a piece of paper. But that paper held the truth, and truth turned out to be stronger than {quest_threat}. Take this: the merchants' gratitude, properly earned.

playerResponses.text: A guild that serves its members instead of robbing them. That's worth fighting for.
Good riddance to corrupt leadership. Keep the new guild honest.
